description_long: This is a tall, knee-high brown leather boot with a slightly rounded toe and a low, flat heel. The boot features two prominent adjustable straps with metallic buckles, one near the top of the shaft and another around the ankle, adding both decorative and functional elements. The leather surface displays natural creases and subtle variations in tone, giving it a rugged, worn-in appearance. The stitching is visible along the back seam and around the sole, indicating sturdy construction. The interior appears to be lined, likely for comfort, and the opening is wide enough to accommodate easy entry. This type of boot is commonly worn in urban environments for both fashion and practical purposes, such as walking or riding.
description: A tall, brown leather boot with two metallic buckles and visible stitching, featuring a rugged, worn-in look and a low heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the boot, both buckles, and the natural leather creases.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, central seam, and the alignment of the top and ankle buckles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth leather surface and the ankle strap, with less visible creasing.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the vertical seam, heel, and the back of the top buckle.
